name: Twilio Notification Sensor
description: Send SMS or WhatsApp notifications via Twilio when Dagster assets fail or succeed. No Twilio SDK required — uses the REST API directly.
author: Dagster Community

triggers.description: Triggers on asset materialization successes and/or failures

outputs.description: Sends SMS or WhatsApp messages via the Twilio Messaging API

account_sid_env_var.label: Account SID Env Var
account_sid_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the Twilio Account SID.

auth_token_env_var.label: Auth Token Env Var
auth_token_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable that holds the Twilio Auth Token.

from_number.label: From Number
from_number.description: Twilio phone number to send from in E.164 format. The 'whatsapp:' prefix is added automatically when channel='whatsapp'.

to_numbers.label: To Numbers
to_numbers.description: List of recipient phone numbers in E.164 format.

enumLabels.whatsapp: WhatsApp — requires a WhatsApp-enabled Twilio number

message_template.label: Message Template
message_template.description: Template for notification messages. Available variables: {asset_key}, {event_type}, {timestamp}, {run_id}.

monitored_assets.label: Monitored Assets
monitored_assets.description: Asset key strings to watch. Leave empty to monitor all assets.

on_failure.label: Notify on Failure
on_failure.description: Send a notification when an asset materialization fails.

on_success.label: Notify on Success
on_success.description: Send a notification when an asset materialization succeeds.
